context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Meta Conversions API (CAPI) server-side purchase event handler using the official Node.js SDK, with proper deduplication, identity signals, and event structure.

checklist.name: Official SDK package
checklist.description: Uses 'facebook-nodejs-business-sdk' (not a custom HTTP client, axios-based approach, or unofficial package)

checklist.name: SDK initialization
checklist.description: Calls FacebookAdsApi.init() with the access token before making any API calls

checklist.name: action_source set to website
checklist.description: Sets action_source (or calls setActionSource) to 'website' on the ServerEvent

checklist.name: eventTime in Unix seconds
checklist.description: Sets eventTime as Unix epoch seconds (e.g. Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)), NOT milliseconds

checklist.name: eventId present
checklist.description: Sets a unique eventId (or event_id) on the CAPI event for deduplication purposes

checklist.name: fbp cookie passed
checklist.description: Includes the _fbp cookie value in the userData (via setFbp or fbp field)

checklist.name: fbc cookie passed
checklist.description: Includes the _fbc cookie value in the userData (via setFbc or fbc field)

checklist.name: clientIpAddress passed
checklist.description: Includes the client IP address in userData (via setClientIpAddress or equivalent)

checklist.name: clientUserAgent passed
checklist.description: Includes the User-Agent header value in userData (via setClientUserAgent or equivalent)

checklist.name: Webhook-triggered CAPI
checklist.description: CAPI event is fired from a webhook/server-side handler, not from browser-only code

checklist.name: Subtotal used for value
checklist.description: Uses order subtotal (not the total including tax/shipping) as the value field in customData

checklist.name: EventRequest execution
checklist.description: Creates an EventRequest with the pixel ID and calls execute() (or equivalent) to send the event
